zh.lifeSummary: 當William Barry 8th Lord Barry於1397年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克巴利也斯 考特時，他的父親John De Barry 7th Baron32歲，母親Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore30歲。他和Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1480年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克巴利也斯 考特享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Barry 8th Lord Barry于1397年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克巴利也斯 考特时，他的父亲John De Barry 7th Baron32岁，母亲Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore30岁。他和Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1480年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克巴利也斯 考特享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Barr
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow) and northern Irish (Ulster): habitational name from any of various places in southwestern Scotland, in particular Ayrshire and Renfrewshire, named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’ or a Brittonic cognate of this.

English and Welsh: habitational name from Great Barr in Staffordshire. This is from Brittonic barro- ‘top, summit’, referring to Barr Beacon; there is evidence that this was known as la Bare in the 13th century.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Barre-en-Ouche in Eure, France, or perhaps from Barre-de-Semilly in Manche, France.

variants.name: Barrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from Barry in Angus or from another place so named, generally named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’, or from a British cognate of this word. This name is also the Scottish form of Barry .
French (Barrié): variant of Barrier .
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

variants.name: Berry
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Dubarry
meanings: French: variant of the topographic or habitational name Barry , with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’.

variants.name: Baril
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Alain, Armand, Ghislaine, Jacques, Jean-Marc, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Monique, Phillippe.
French: from Old French baril ‘barrel’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, or a nickname for a rotund man. Compare Barry 7 and Berry 7.

History: Jean Baril from the Saintonge region of France was in QC by 1673, when he married Marie Guillet, the first of his three wives. He died in 1724 in Batiscan, QC. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Barrie, Bar(r)y, and Berry.

variants.name: Bary
meanings: Walloon and northern French: variant of   Barry   8.
French (southern): rare variant of   Barry   6.
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Barry 8th Lord Barry was born in 1397, in Barry's Court, County Cork, Ireland, his father, John De Barry 7th Baron, was 32 and his mother, Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore, was 30. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore. He died in 1480, in Barry's Court, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Barry 8th Lord Barry est né en 1397, à Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlande, son père, John De Barry 7th Baron, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore. Il est décédé en 1480, à Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Barry 8th Lord Barry 1397 in Barry's Court, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Barry 7th Baron 32 und seine Mutter Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore 30. Er hatte mit Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1480 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Barry's Court, County Cork, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Barry 8th Lord Barry è nato il nel 1397 nel Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, John De Barry 7th Baron, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore. Morì nel 1480, nel Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Barry 8th Lord Barryが1397年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクバーリ'ス コウルトで生まれた時，父John De Barry 7th Baronは32歳，母Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymoreは30歳であった。彼はLady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymoreとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1480年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクバーリ'ス コウルトで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Barry 8th Lord Barry(이)가 1397년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 배리'스 쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Barry 7th Baron(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 배리'스 쿠르트에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Barry 8th Lord Barry nasceu em 1397, em Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, John De Barry 7th Baron, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore. Ele faleceu em 1480, em Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlanda, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Barry 8th Lord Barry родился в 1397 г. в местности барри'с коурт, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени John De Barry 7th Baron было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore. Он умер в 1480 г. в местности барри'с коурт, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Barry 8th Lord Barry nació en 1397, en Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, John De Barry 7th Baron, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore. Murió en 1480, en Barry's Court, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 83 años.
